scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n identity,catalog,checkout,frontend,webhook -c green,blue,magenta,yellow,cyan "npm --prefix services/identity run dev" "npm --prefix services/catalog run dev" "npm --prefix services/checkout run dev" "npm --prefix front-end run dev" "node tools/mock-n8n-webhook.js"
scripts.dev:v2: concurrently -n identity,catalog,checkout,frontend,webhook -c green,blue,magenta,yellow,cyan "npm --prefix services/identity run dev" "npm --prefix services/catalog run dev" "npm --prefix services/checkout run dev" "npm --prefix front-end run dev" "node tools/mock-n8n-webhook.js"
scripts.dev:checkout: concurrently -n catalog,checkout,frontend,webhook -c blue,magenta,yellow,cyan "npm --prefix services/catalog run dev" "npm --prefix services/checkout run dev" "npm --prefix front-end run dev" "node tools/mock-n8n-webhook.js"
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:ai-agent
